title: South Bend approves $4.6M infrastructure support for affordable housing project
description: The South Bend Redevelopment Commission approved a development agreement Thursday committing $4.6 million in city infrastructure funding to support construction of 42 affordable housing units on the city’s near west side

title: Oakland City University not closing, spokesperson says
description:

title: US industrial production rises by most in over a year
description:

title: GM to pause construction of EV battery plant in New Carlisle, officials say
description:
